sections_cited: section 143 of the Sindh Local Government Act

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, MIRPURKHAS Constitution Petition No.D-293 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For order on office objection 2. For hearing of main case 14.04.2026 Mr. Tehseen Ahmed H. Qureshi, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Ayaz Ali Rajpar, A.A.G. = The petitioner has filed Miscellaneous Appeal under section 143 of the Sindh Local Government Act, 2013 before the respondent No.1, which is still yet not been decided. Mr. Raj Kumar Lohano, advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of respondents Nos.1 & 2, which is taken on record. He submits that appeal of the petitioner shall be decided in accordance with law. Learned counsel for the petitioner has expressed his satisfaction and seeks disposal of the petition. Respondent No.1 is directed to decide the Miscellaneous Appeal of the petitioner, available at Page No.35 of this Court file in accordance with law, after providing proper opportunity of hearing to the petitioner within thirty days from the date of receipt of this order. In the above terms, instant petition stands disposed of. Office is directed to communicate this order to the respondent No.1 for compliance. JUDGE JUDGE “Chander Kumar*
